fullOutput:
<path>/Users/rene/Develop/opencode/ferienwohnung/styles.css</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: /* ─── TOKENS ─── */
2: :root {
3:   --bg:           #f4f6f5;
4:   --surface:      #ffffff;
5:   --text:         #111827;
6:   --muted:        #4b5563;
7:   --subtle:       #9ca3af;
8:   --brand:        #1a7a5e;
9:   --brand-dark:   #135e48;
10:   --brand-light:  #e6f4f0;
11:   --accent:       #f59e0b;
12:   --line:         #e5e7eb;
13:   --radius-sm:    8px;
14:   --radius-md:    14px;
15:   --radius-lg:    20px;
16:   --shadow-sm:    0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
17:   --shadow-md:    0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.09);
18:   --shadow-lg:    0 16px 56px rgba(0,0,0,.13);
19: }
20: 
21: /* ─── RESET ─── */
22: *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
23: 
24: html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
25: 
26: body {
27:   font-family: "Plus Jakarta Sans", system-ui, sans-serif;
28:   font-size: 1rem;
29:   line-height: 1.65;
30:   color: var(--text);
31:   background: var(--bg);
32:   -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
33: }
34: 
35: img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
36: a   { color: inherit; }
37: 
38: h1, h2, h3 {
39:   font-family: "Bricolage Grotesque", system-ui, sans-serif;
40:   line-height: 1.1;
41:   letter-spacing: -0.02em;
42: }
43: 
44: /* ─── TOPBAR ─── */
45: .topbar {
46:   position: sticky;
47:   top: 0;
48:   z-index: 30;
49:   display: flex;
50:   align-items: center;
51:   justify-content: space-between;
52:   gap: 1rem;
53:   padding: 0 clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 3rem);
54:   height: 62px;
55:   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
56:   background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
57:   backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
58: }
59: 
60: .brand {
61:   font-family: "Bricolage Grotesque", sans-serif;
62:   font-size: 1.05rem;
63:   font-weight: 700;
64:   text-decoration: none;
65:   white-space: nowrap;
66:   letter-spacing: -0.02em;
67:   color: var(--brand-dark);
68:   /* Mindest-Touch-Target: volle Topbar-Höhe nutzen */
69:   display: flex;
70:   align-items: center;
71:   align-self: stretch;
72: }
73: 
74: .menu {
75:   display: flex;
76:   gap: 0.15rem;
77:   align-self: stretch;
78:   align-items: stretch;
79: }
80: 
81: .menu a {
82:   padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
83:   border-radius: 999px;
84:   font-size: 0.875rem;
85:   font-weight: 500;
86:   color: var(--muted);
87:   text-decoration: none;
88:   transition: background 150ms, color 150ms;
89:   /* Touch-Target: Topbar-Höhe (62px) wird durch align-self: stretch genutzt */
90:   display: flex;
91:   align-items: center;
92:   align-self: stretch;
93: }
94: 
95: .menu a:hover {
96:   background: var(--line);
97:   color: var(--text);
98: }
99: 
100: .cta {
101:   display: inline-flex;
102:   align-items: center;
103:   padding: 0.5rem 1.1rem;
104:   border-radius: 999px;
105:   background: var(--brand);
106:   color: #fff;
107:   font-size: 0.875rem;
108:   font-weight: 600;
109:   text-decoration: none;
110:   white-space: nowrap;
111:   transition: background 150ms;
112: }
113: 
114: .cta:hover { background: var(--brand-dark); }
115: 
116: /* ─── LAYOUT WRAPPER ─── */
117: main {
118:   max-width: 1160px;
119:   margin: 0 auto;
120:   padding: 2.5rem clamp(1rem, 4vw, 2.5rem) 0;
121:   display: flex;
122:   flex-direction: column;
123:   gap: 1.5rem;
124: }
125: 
126: /* ─── HERO ─── */
127: .hero {
128:   display: grid;
129:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 460px;
130:   gap: 1.25rem;
131:   align-items: stretch;
132: }
133: 
134: .hero-image {
135:   position: relative;
136:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
137:   overflow: hidden;
138:   min-height: 440px;
139:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
140: }
141: 
142: .hero-image img {
143:   height: 100%;
144:   object-position: center 60%;
145: }
146: 
147: .hero-content {
148:   background: var(--surface);
149:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
150:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
151:   padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);
152:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
153:   display: flex;
154:   flex-direction: column;
155: }
156: 
157: .eyebrow {
158:   font-size: 0.7rem;
159:   font-weight: 700;
160:   letter-spacing: 0.12em;
161:   text-transform: uppercase;
162:   color: var(--brand);
163:   margin-bottom: 0.65rem;
164: }
165: 
166: h1 {
167:   font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 3.2vw, 2.6rem);
168:   font-weight: 800;
169:   margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
170:   color: var(--text);
171: }
172: 
173: .hero-sub {
174:   color: var(--muted);
175:   font-size: 1rem;
176:   margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
177:   line-height: 1.7;
178: }
179: 
180: .hero-stats {
181:   display: flex;
182:   align-items: center;
183:   gap: 0;
184:   padding: 1rem 0;
185:   border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
186:   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
187:   margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
188: }
189: 
190: .stat {
191:   flex: 1;
192:   display: flex;
193:   flex-direction: column;
194:   align-items: center;
195:   gap: 0.1rem;
196: }
197: 
198: .stat strong {
199:   font-size: 1.2rem;
200:   font-weight: 700;
201:   font-family: "Bricolage Grotesque", sans-serif;
202: }
203: 
204: .stat span {
205:   font-size: 0.72rem;
206:   color: var(--muted);
207:   text-align: center;
208:   font-weight: 500;
209: }
210: 
211: .stat-divider {
212:   width: 1px;
213:   height: 28px;
214:   background: var(--line);
215: }
216: 
217: .hero-actions {
218:   display: flex;
219:   flex-direction: column;
220:   gap: 0.65rem;
221:   margin-top: auto;
222: }
223: 
224: .button {
225:   display: inline-flex;
226:   align-items: center;
227:   justify-content: center;
228:   padding: 0.75rem 1.4rem;
229:   border-radius: 999px;
230:   font-size: 0.9rem;
231:   font-weight: 600;
232:   text-decoration: none;
233:   text-align: center;
234:   transition: all 160ms ease;
235:   border: 1.5px solid transparent;
236: }
237: 
238: .button.primary {
239:   background: var(--brand);
240:   color: #fff;
241: }
242: 
243: .button.primary:hover { background: var(--brand-dark); }
244: 
245: .button.secondary {
246:   background: transparent;
247:   border-color: var(--line);
248:   color: var(--text);
249: }
250: 
251: .button.secondary:hover { background: var(--line); }
252: 
253: /* ─── HIGHLIGHTS ─── */
254: .highlights {
255:   display: grid;
256:   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
257:   gap: 1rem;
258: }
259: 
260: .highlight-card {
261:   background: var(--surface);
262:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
263:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
264:   padding: 1.4rem;
265:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
266:   transition: box-shadow 200ms, transform 200ms;
267: }
268: 
269: .highlight-card:hover {
270:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
271:   transform: translateY(-3px);
272: }
273: 
274: .hi-icon {
275:   width: 44px;
276:   height: 44px;
277:   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
278:   background: var(--brand-light);
279:   display: flex;
280:   align-items: center;
281:   justify-content: center;
282:   margin-bottom: 1rem;
283: }
284: 
285: .hi-icon svg {
286:   width: 20px;
287:   height: 20px;
288:   color: var(--brand);
289: }
290: 
291: .highlight-card h3 {
292:   font-size: 0.95rem;
293:   font-weight: 700;
294:   margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
295:   letter-spacing: -0.01em;
296: }
297: 
298: .highlight-card p {
299:   font-size: 0.875rem;
300:   color: var(--muted);
301:   line-height: 1.6;
302: }
303: 
304: /* ─── SECTION BASE ─── */
305: .section {
306:   background: var(--surface);
307:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
308:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
309:   padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
310:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
311: }
312: 
313: .section-label {
314:   font-size: 0.7rem;
315:   font-weight: 700;
316:   letter-spacing: 0.12em;
317:   text-transform: uppercase;
318:   color: var(--brand);
319:   margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
320: }
321: 
322: .section h2 {
323:   font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.9rem);
324:   margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
325:   font-weight: 700;
326: }
327: 
328: /* ─── AMENITY GRID ─── */
329: .amenity-grid {
330:   display: grid;
331:   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
332:   gap: 0.75rem;
333: }
334: 
335: .amenity {
336:   display: flex;
337:   align-items: flex-start;
338:   gap: 0.8rem;
339:   padding: 1rem;
340:   border: 1px solid var(--line);
341:   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
342:   background: var(--bg);
343:   transition: border-color 150ms;
344: }
345: 
346: .amenity:hover {
347:   border-color: var(--brand-light);
348: }
349: 
350: .amenity svg {
351:   flex-shrink: 0;
352:   width: 20px;
353:   height: 20px;
354:   margin-top: 2px;
355:   color: var(--brand);
356: }
357: 
358: .amenity div {
359:   display: flex;
360:   flex-direction: column;
361:   gap: 0.15rem;
362: }
363: 
364: .amenity strong {
365:   font-size: 0.875rem;
366:   font-weight: 600;
367: }
368: 
369: .amenity span {
370:   font-size: 0.8rem;
371:   color: var(--muted);
372: }
373: 
374: /* ─── LAGE ─── */
375: .lage-section {
376:   display: grid;
377:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
378:   gap: 0;
379:   align-items: stretch;
380:   padding: 0;
381:   overflow: hidden;
382: }
383: 
384: .lage-text {
385:   padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
386: }
387: 
388: .lage-text h2 {
389:   margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
390:   font-weight: 700;
391: }
392: 
393: .lage-text p {
394:   color: var(--muted);
395:   margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
396: }
397: 
398: .checklist {
399:   list-style: none;
400:   display: flex;
401:   flex-direction: column;
402:   gap: 0.55rem;
403: }
404: 
405: .checklist li {
406:   display: flex;
407:   align-items: center;
408:   gap: 0.65rem;
409:   font-size: 0.925rem;
410:   font-weight: 500;
411: }
412: 
413: .checklist svg {
414:   flex-shrink: 0;
415:   width: 16px;
416:   height: 16px;
417:   color: var(--brand);
418: }
419: 
420: .lage-image {
421:   height: 100%;
422:   min-height: 320px;
423: }
424: 
425: .lage-image img {
426:   height: 100%;
427:   object-position: center center;
428: }
429: 
430: /* ─── GALLERY ─── */
431: .gallery {
432:   display: grid;
433:   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
434:   gap: 0.75rem;
435:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
436:   overflow: hidden;
437: }
438: 
439: .gallery img {
440:   height: 210px;
441:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
442:   transition: transform 300ms ease, box-shadow 300ms;
443:   cursor: pointer;
444: }
445: 
446: .gallery img:hover {
447:   transform: scale(1.025);
448:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
449:   z-index: 1;
450:   position: relative;
451: }
452: 
453: /* ─── CONTACT BANNER ─── */
454: .contact-banner {
455:   border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
456:   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d2b22 0%, #1a4a35 55%, #1a7a5e 100%);
457:   padding: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
458:   box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
459:   color: #fff;
460: }
461: 
462: .contact-inner {
463:   display: flex;
464:   align-items: center;
465:   justify-content: space-between;
466:   gap: 2rem;
467: }
468: 
469: .contact-text h2 {
470:   font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 2.8vw, 2.2rem);
471:   margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
472:   color: #fff;
473:   font-weight: 700;
474: }
475: 
476: .contact-text p {
477:   color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
478:   max-width: 42ch;
479: }
480: 
481: .contact-actions {
482:   display: flex;
483:   flex-direction: column;
484:   gap: 0.75rem;
485:   flex-shrink: 0;
486: }
487: 
488: .contact-link {
489:   display: inline-flex;
490:   align-items: center;
491:   gap: 0.75rem;
492:   padding: 0.85rem 1.4rem;
493:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
494:   font-weight: 600;
495:   font-size: 0.9rem;
496:   text-decoration: none;
497:   transition: all 160ms;
498:   white-space: nowrap;
499: }
500: 
501: .contact-link svg {
502:   width: 18px;
503:   height: 18px;
504:   flex-shrink: 0;
505: }
506: 
507: .contact-link.email {
508:   background: #fff;
509:   color: var(--brand-dark);
510: }
511: 
512: .contact-link.email:hover {
513:   background: var(--brand-light);
514: }
515: 
516: .contact-link.phone {
517:   background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
518:   color: #fff;
519:   border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
520: }
521: 
522: .contact-link.phone:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); }
523: 
524: /* ─── FOOTER ─── */
525: footer {
526:   max-width: 1160px;
527:   margin: 2.5rem auto 0;
528:   padding: 2rem clamp(1rem, 4vw, 2.5rem);
529:   border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
530:   display: flex;
531:   justify-content: space-between;
532:   align-items: center;
533:   color: var(--muted);
534:   font-size: 0.85rem;
535:   gap: 1rem;
536:   flex-wrap: wrap;
537: }
538: 
539: .footer-sub { color: var(--subtle); }
540: 
541: /* ─── BESCHREIBUNG ─── */
542: .description-section {
543:   display: grid;
544:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
545:   gap: 2rem;
546:   align-items: start;
547: }
548: 
549: .desc-text h2 {
550:   margin-bottom: 1rem;
551:   font-weight: 700;
552: }
553: 
554: .desc-text p {
555:   color: var(--muted);
556:   margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
557:   font-size: 0.97rem;
558: }
559: 
560: .desc-note {
561:   font-size: 0.82rem !important;
562:   color: var(--subtle) !important;
563:   border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
564:   padding-top: 0.75rem;
565:   margin-top: 0.5rem;
566: }
567: 
568: .desc-images {
569:   display: grid;
570:   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
571:   gap: 0.75rem;
572: }
573: 
574: .desc-images img {
575:   height: 180px;
576:   border-radius: var(--radius-md);
577:   object-fit: cover;
578: }
579: 
580: /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─── */
581: @media (max-width: 1024px) {
582:   .amenity-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
583: }
584: 
585: @media (max-width: 860px) {
586:   .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
587:   .hero-image { min-height: 300px; }
588:   /* Buttons bleiben vertikal gestapelt auf Tablet/Mobile */
589:   .highlights { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
590:   .description-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
591:   .lage-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
592:   .lage-image { min-height: 220px; }
593:   .contact-inner { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
594:   .contact-actions { width: 100%; }
595:   .contact-link { justify-content: center; }
596: 
597:   /* Topbar: Schrift etwas kleiner, damit CTA nicht überläuft */
598:   .topbar { padding: 0 1.25rem; gap: 0.75rem; }
599:   .brand { font-size: 0.95rem; }
600:   .menu a { padding: 0.5rem 0.6rem; font-size: 0.82rem; }
601:   .cta {
602:     padding: 0.6rem 0.9rem;
603:     font-size: 0.82rem;
604:     min-height: 44px;
605:     flex-shrink: 0;
606:   }
607: }
608: 
609: @media (max-width: 600px) {
610:   /* ─── TOPBAR ─── */
611:   .topbar {
612:     padding: 0 1rem;
613:     gap: 0.5rem;
614:     height: 56px;
615:   }
616:   .menu { display: none; }
617:   /* Brand darf umbrechen, bleibt aber lesbar */
618:   .brand {
619:     font-size: 0.95rem;
620:     white-space: normal;
621:     line-height: 1.2;
622:   }
623:   /* CTA: kleineres Padding, trotzdem ≥44px hoch durch min-height */
624:   .cta {
625:     padding: 0.6rem 0.9rem;
626:     font-size: 0.8rem;
627:     min-height: 44px;
628:     flex-shrink: 0;
629:   }
630: 
631:   /* ─── MAIN ─── */
632:   main {
633:     padding-top: 1.5rem;
634:     gap: 1rem;
635:   }
636: 
637:   /* ─── HERO ─── */
638:   .hero-image { min-height: 260px; }
639:   .hero-content {
640:     padding: 1.25rem;
641:   }
642:   h1 { font-size: 1.75rem; }
643:   .hero-sub { font-size: 0.95rem; }
644:   .hero-actions {
645:     flex-direction: column;
646:     gap: 0.6rem;
647:   }
648:   .button {
649:     padding: 0.85rem 1.2rem;
650:     font-size: 0.9rem;
651:     min-height: 48px;
652:   }
653: 
654:   /* ─── HIGHLIGHTS ─── */
655:   .highlights { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
656:   .highlight-card { padding: 1.1rem; }
657: 
658:   /* ─── SECTION ─── */
659:   .section { padding: 1.25rem; }
660:   .section h2 { font-size: 1.35rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
661: 
662:   /* ─── AMENITY ─── */
663:   .amenity-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
664: 
665:   /* ─── GALLERY ─── */
666:   .gallery {
667:     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
668:     gap: 0.5rem;
669:   }
670:   .gallery img { height: 160px; }
671: 
672:   /* ─── BESCHREIBUNG ─── */
673:   .description-section { padding: 1.25rem; gap: 1.25rem; }
674:   .desc-images { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
675:   .desc-images img { height: 200px; }
676: 
677:   /* ─── LAGE ─── */
678:   .lage-text { padding: 1.25rem; }
679:   .lage-image { min-height: 200px; max-height: 240px; }
680:   .checklist li { font-size: 0.9rem; }
681: 
682:   /* ─── KONTAKT ─── */
683:   .contact-banner { padding: 1.5rem 1.25rem; }
684:   .contact-text h2 { font-size: 1.5rem; }
685:   .contact-text p { font-size: 0.9rem; }
686:   .contact-link {
687:     padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
688:     font-size: 0.875rem;
689:     min-height: 52px;
690:     /* Lange E-Mail-Adresse darf umbrechen */
691:     white-space: normal;
692:     word-break: break-all;
693:   }
694: 
695:   /* ─── FOOTER ─── */
696:   footer {
697:     flex-direction: column;
698:     text-align: center;
699:     font-size: 0.8rem;
700:     padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
701:     gap: 0.4rem;
702:   }
703: }
704: 
705: /* ─── SEHR KLEINE GERÄTE (≤360px) ─── */
706: @media (max-width: 360px) {
707:   .topbar { padding: 0 0.75rem; }
708:   .brand { font-size: 0.875rem; }
709:   .cta { padding: 0.55rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.775rem; }
710:   main { padding-left: 0.75rem; padding-right: 0.75rem; }
711:   .hero-content { padding: 1rem; }
712:   .section { padding: 1rem; }
713:   .contact-banner { padding: 1.25rem 1rem; }
714:   .lage-text { padding: 1rem; }
715: }
